nodes.name: Picus
nodes.summary: Picus（Picus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联13种鸟类，如Crimson-winged woodpecker、黄冠啄木鸟、鳞腹啄木鸟等13种鸟类。

nodes.name: Crimson-winged woodpecker
nodes.summary: The crimson-winged woodpecker (Picus puniceus) is a species of bird in the woodpecker family. It is found in Brunei, Indonesia, Malaysia, Myanmar, Singapore, and Thailand. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. It can grow up to 25 cm long. Its diet is mainly insects and larvae. It is a bright and colourful bird that is hard to misidentify. References
